Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-IPC-Cache/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-IPC-Cache/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-IPC-Cache/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:40:30 2014	(r355212)
+++ head/devel/p5-IPC-Cache/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:40:34 2014	(r355213)
@@ -7,9 +7,11 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Persist data across processes via shared memory
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv1
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-IPC-ShareLite>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-IPC-ShareLite
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
